name: Redeye Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. All drippings from a skillet of ham or bacon should be reserved in the skillet itself.
2. Pour 1 cup of black coffee into the hot drippings in the skillet.
3. Stir gently but do not allow to boil.
4. Sprinkle 1/4 tspn of black pepper into the mixture.
5. Carefully pour off the gravy into a bowl or gravy boat.
6. Serve hot over grits, mashed potatoes, rice, cornbread, or biscuits.
